'''âv-dh-zh''' ('''kavadhazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:veneer|veneer]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-dh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:veneer|veneer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-dh-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kavadhazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivadhazh|thivadhazh]] || [[word:jivadhazh|jivadhazh]] || [[word:shivadhazh|shivadhazh]] || [[word:kivadhazh|kivadhazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvadhazh|thuthuvadhazh]] || [[word:jujuvadhazh|jujuvadhazh]] || [[word:shushuvadhazh|shushuvadhazh]] || [[word:kukuvadhazh|kukuvadhazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvadhazh|thuvadhazh]] || [[word:juvadhazh|juvadhazh]] || [[word:shuvadhazh|shuvadhazh]] || [[word:kuvadhazh|kuvadhazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvadhazh|thuvadhazh]] || [[word:juvadhazh|juvadhazh]] || [[word:shuvadhazh|shuvadhazh]] || [[word:kuvadhazh|kuvadhazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevadhazh|thevadhazh]] || [[word:jevadhazh|jevadhazh]] || [[word:shevadhazh|shevadhazh]] || [[word:kevadhazh|kevadhazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovadhazh|thothovadhazh]] || [[word:jojovadhazh|jojovadhazh]] || [[word:shoshovadhazh|shoshovadhazh]] || [[word:kokovadhazh|kokovadhazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovadhazh|thovadhazh]] || [[word:jovadhazh|jovadhazh]] || [[word:shovadhazh|shovadhazh]] || [[word:kovadhazh|kovadhazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovadhazh|thovadhazh]] || [[word:jovadhazh|jovadhazh]] || [[word:shovadhazh|shovadhazh]] || [[word:kovadhazh|kovadhazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvadhazh|thĂŠvadhazh]] || [[word:jĂŠvadhazh|jĂŠvadhazh]] || [[word:shĂŠvadhazh|shĂŠvadhazh]] || [[word:kĂŠvadhazh|kĂŠvadhazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavadhazh|thathavadhazh]] || [[word:jajavadhazh|jajavadhazh]] || [[word:shashavadhazh|shashavadhazh]] || [[word:kakavadhazh|kakavadhazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavadhazh|thavadhazh]] || [[word:javadhazh|javadhazh]] || [[word:shavadhazh|shavadhazh]] || [[word:kavadhazh|kavadhazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavadhazh|thavadhazh]] || [[word:javadhazh|javadhazh]] || [[word:shavadhazh|shavadhazh]] || [[word:kavadhazh|kavadhazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavadhazh|shavadhazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavadhazh|goshavadhazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavadhazh|gokishavadhazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavadhazhnĂŒ|shavadhazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavadhazhnknĂŒ|goshavadhazhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavadhazhnĂŒ|gokishavadhazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavadhazhshĂ«|shavadhazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavadhazhnkshĂ«|goshavadhazhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavadhazhshĂ«|gokishavadhazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavadhazhro|shavadhazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavadhazhnkro|goshavadhazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavadhazhro|gokishavadhazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavadhazhmu|shavadhazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavadhazhnkmu|goshavadhazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavadhazhmu|gokishavadhazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavadhazhsher|shavadhazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavadhazhnksher|goshavadhazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavadhazhsher|gokishavadhazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavadhazhng|shavadhazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavadhazhnkng|goshavadhazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavadhazhng|gokishavadhazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavadhazhya|shavadhazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavadhazhnkya|goshavadhazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavadhazhya|gokishavadhazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavadhazhyam|shavadhazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavadhazhnkyam|goshavadhazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavadhazhyam|gokishavadhazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavadhazhnĂŒshĂ«|shavadhazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavadhazhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshavadhazhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavadhazhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishavadhazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavadhazhnĂŒro|shavadhazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavadhazhnknĂŒro|goshavadhazhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavadhazhnĂŒro|gokishavadhazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavadhazhnĂŒmu|shavadhazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavadhazhnknĂŒmu|goshavadhazhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavadhazhnĂŒmu|gokishavadhazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavadhazhshĂ«nĂŒ|shavadhazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavadhazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshavadhazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavadhazhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishavadhazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavadhazhshĂ«ro|shavadhazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavadhazhnkshĂ«ro|goshavadhazhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavadhazhshĂ«ro|gokishavadhazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavadhazhshĂ«mu|shavadhazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavadhazhnkshĂ«mu|goshavadhazhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavadhazhshĂ«mu|gokishavadhazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavadhazhronĂŒ|shavadhazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavadhazhnkronĂŒ|goshavadhazhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavadhazhronĂŒ|gokishavadhazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavadhazhroshĂ«|shavadhazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavadhazhnkroshĂ«|goshavadhazhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavadhazhroshĂ«|gokishavadhazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavadhazhromu|shavadhazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavadhazhnkromu|goshavadhazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavadhazhromu|gokishavadhazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavadhazhmunĂŒ|shavadhazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavadhazhnkmunĂŒ|goshavadhazhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavadhazhmunĂŒ|gokishavadhazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavadhazhmushĂ«|shavadhazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavadhazhnkmushĂ«|goshavadhazhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavadhazhmushĂ«|gokishavadhazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavadhazhmuro|shavadhazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavadhazhnkmuro|goshavadhazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavadhazhmuro|gokishavadhazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
